title: React components should not be nested
description:
React components should not be nestedAnalyze your codeintentionality-efficientmaintainabilityCode SmellreactjsxperformanceWhy is this an issue?More InfoReact components should not be nested, as their state will be lost on each re-render of their parent component, possibly introducing bugs. This will also impact performance as child components will be recreated unnecessarily.If the goal is to have the state reset, use akeyinstead of relying on a parent state.function Component() { function NestedComponent() { // Noncompliant: NestedComponent should be moved outside Component return
; } return (

} /> { /* Noncompliant: Component is created inside prop */ }
); }class
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: React components should not be nested inside other components - move component outside
